Description: Multi-Tenant ML Training Platform - single-table DynamoDB design with overloaded GSIs. One table (default name 'ml-platform') holds every entity (Tenant, GroupMapping, UserProfile, TrainingJob, Experiment, ExperimentRun, ModelVersion, GovernanceReview, AuditEvent, NotebookSession, SnowflakeTokenCache). Access patterns are served by three overloaded GSIs plus TTL on the SnowflakeTokenCache tokens.

TableName.Description: Name of the single DynamoDB table.

Properties.//: Only key attributes are declared (schemaless items may carry any other attributes). PK/SK are the base primary key. GSI1/GSI2/GSI3 are overloaded string keys reused across entities.

GlobalSecondaryIndexes.//: GSI1 = primary 'by tenantId' axis (overloaded). Examples of GSI1PK/GSI1SK per entity: Tenant status -> STATUS#<status> / TENANT#<tenantId>; GroupMapping -> TENANT#<tenantId> / GROUPMAPPING#<groupId>; UserProfile -> TENANT#<tenantId> / USER#<userId>; TrainingJob -> TENANT#<tenantId> / STATUS#<status>#JOB#<jobId>; Experiment -> TENANT#<tenantId> / EXPERIMENT#<experimentId>; ExperimentRun -> TENANT#<tenantId> / RUN#<runId>; ModelVersion -> TENANT#<tenantId> / STAGE#<stage>#MODEL#<name>#V#<version>; GovernanceReview -> TENANT#<tenantId> / REVIEW#<reviewId>; AuditEvent -> TENANT#<tenantId> / TS#<timestamp>#EVENT#<eventId>; NotebookSession -> TENANT#<tenantId> / SESSION#<sessionId>.

GSI2 = secondary axis (overloaded). Examples: UserProfile by email -> EMAIL#<email> / USER#<userId>; TrainingJob by userId -> USER#<userId> / TS#<createdAt>#JOB#<jobId>; ExperimentRun by experimentId -> EXPERIMENT#<experimentId> / RUN#<runId>; ModelVersion by name+version -> MODELNAME#<name> / V#<version>; GovernanceReview by modelId -> MODEL#<modelId> / REVIEW#<reviewId>; AuditEvent by userId+timestamp -> USER#<userId> / TS#<timestamp>#EVENT#<eventId>; NotebookSession by userId -> USER#<userId> / SESSION#<sessionId>.

GSI3 = tertiary axis (overloaded). Examples: GroupMapping by role -> ROLE#<role> / GROUPMAPPING#<groupId>; Tenant by status (global) -> ENTITY#TENANT / STATUS#<status>#<tenantId>; UserProfile by role -> ROLE#<role> / USER#<userId>. Provides a third query dimension for entities that need it.

TimeToLiveSpecification.//: Used by SnowflakeTokenCache items (attribute 'expiresAt', epoch seconds). Harmless no-op for items without that attribute.

StreamArn.Description: DynamoDB table ARN (for reference in IAM policies)
